contents: (** This file implements algebra homomorphism. We show that algebras form a wild category with homomorphisms. The [WildCat] module provides some nice notations that we use: [A $-> B] for homomorphism, [Id] for the identity homomorphism and [g $o f] for composition. *)
Context {σ} {A B : Algebra σ} (f : forall (s : Sort σ), A s -> B s).

Definition OpPreserving {w : SymbolType σ}
    (α : Operation A w) (β : Operation B w) : Type
    := forall a : DomOperation A w,
        f (sort_cod w) (α a) = β (fun i => f (sorts_dom w i) (a i)).

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s

contents:
Class IsHomomorphism : Type
    := oppreserving_hom : forall (u : Symbol σ), OpPreserving u.#A u.#B.

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s

contents:
Record Homomorphism {σ} {A B : Algebra σ} : Type := Build_Homomorphism
  { def_homomorphism : forall (s : Sort σ), A s -> B s
  ; is_homomorphism :: IsHomomorphism def_homomorphism }.

Instance isgraph_algebra (σ : Signature) : IsGraph (Algebra σ)
  := Build_IsGraph (Algebra σ) Homomorphism.

Lemma apD10_homomorphism {σ} {A B : Algebra σ} {f g : A $-> B}
  : f = g -> forall s, f s == g s.

goals.conclusion: f = g -> forall s : Sort σ, f s == g s
f = g -> forall s : Sort σ, f s == g s
forall s : Sort σ, f s == g s

contents:
Definition SigHomomorphism {σ} (A B : Algebra σ) : Type :=
  { def_hom : forall s, A s -> B s | IsHomomorphism def_hom }.

Lemma issig_homomorphism {σ} (A B : Algebra σ)
  : SigHomomorphism A B <~> (A $-> B).

Instance hset_homomorphism `{Funext} {σ} (A B : Algebra σ)
  : IsHSet (A $-> B).

goals.conclusion: (issig_homomorphism A B)^-1 f = (issig_homomorphism A B)^-1 g

contents:
#[export] Instance is_homomorphism_id
    : IsHomomorphism (fun s (x : A s) => x).

goals.conclusion: u.#A a = u.#A (fun i : Arity (σ u) => a i)

hypotheses.type: forall i : Arity (σ u), A (sorts_dom (σ u) i)

contents:
Definition homomorphism_id : A $-> A
    := Build_Homomorphism (fun s (x : A s) => x).

goals.conclusion: IsHomomorphism (fun s : Sort σ => g s o f s)

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, B s -> C s
forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s

goals.conclusion: IsHomomorphism (fun s : Sort σ => g s o f s)

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, B s -> C s
forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s

goals.conclusion:
g (sort_cod (σ u)) (f (sort_cod (σ u)) (u.#A a)) =
u.#C
  (fun i : Arity (σ u) => g (sorts_dom (σ u) i) (f (sorts_dom (σ u) i) (a i)))

hypotheses.type: forall s : Sort σ, B s -> C s
forall s : Sort σ, A s -> B s
forall i : Arity (σ u), A (sorts_dom (σ u) i)

contents:
Definition homomorphism_compose (g : B $-> C) (f : A $-> B) : A $-> C
    := Build_Homomorphism (fun s => g s o f s).

Instance is01cat_algebra (σ : Signature) : Is01Cat (Algebra σ)
  := Build_Is01Cat _ _
      (fun _ => homomorphism_id) (fun _ _ _ => homomorphism_compose).

Instance is2graph_algebra {σ} : Is2Graph (Algebra σ)
  := fun A B
    => Build_IsGraph _ (fun (f g : A $-> B) => forall s, f s == g s).

Instance is01cat_homomorphism {σ} (A B : Algebra σ)
  : Is01Cat (A $-> B).

goals.conclusion: forall a : A $-> B, a $-> a
forall a b c : A $-> B, (b $-> c) -> (a $-> b) -> a $-> c
forall a : A $-> B, a $-> a
forall a b c : A $-> B, (b $-> c) -> (a $-> b) -> a $-> c

contents: exact (fun f g h P Q s x => Q s x @ P s x).

Instance is0gpd_homomorphism {σ} {A B : Algebra σ}
  : Is0Gpd (A $-> B).

goals.conclusion: forall a b : A $-> B, (a $-> b) -> b $-> a

contents: intros f g P s x.

goals.conclusion: g s x = f s x
forall a b : A $-> B, (a $-> b) -> cat_postcomp A h a $-> cat_postcomp A h b

cat_postcomp A h
  {| def_homomorphism := f; is_homomorphism := is_homomorphism0 |} s x =
cat_postcomp A h
  {| def_homomorphism := g; is_homomorphism := is_homomorphism1 |} s x

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0
forall s0 : Sort σ, A s0 -> B s0

{| def_homomorphism := f; is_homomorphism := is_homomorphism0 |} $->
{| def_homomorphism := g; is_homomorphism := is_homomorphism1 |}

goals.conclusion: forall a b : B $-> C, (a $-> b) -> cat_precomp C h a $-> cat_precomp C h b

cat_precomp C h
  {| def_homomorphism := f; is_homomorphism := is_homomorphism0 |} s x =
cat_precomp C h
  {| def_homomorphism := g; is_homomorphism := is_homomorphism1 |} s x

hypotheses.type: forall s0 : Sort σ, B s0 -> C s0
forall s0 : Sort σ, B s0 -> C s0

{| def_homomorphism := f; is_homomorphism := is_homomorphism0 |} $->
{| def_homomorphism := g; is_homomorphism := is_homomorphism1 |}

goals.conclusion:
forall (a b c d : Algebra σ) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o g $o f = h $o (g $o f)

forall (a b c d : Algebra σ) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o (g $o f) = h $o g $o f
forall (a b : Algebra σ) (f : a $-> b), Id b $o f = f
forall (a b : Algebra σ) (f : a $-> b), f $o Id a = f

forall (a b c d : Algebra σ) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o g $o f = h $o (g $o f)

forall (a b c d : Algebra σ) (f : a $-> b) (g : b $-> c) 
(h : c $-> d), h $o (g $o f) = h $o g $o f
forall (a b : Algebra σ) (f : a $-> b), Id b $o f = f
forall (a b : Algebra σ) (f : a $-> b), f $o Id a = f
